SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am12
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Model.Logic

Class Match

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Model.Logic.Match
public class Match extends Object
Represents an ongoing match with all its components.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Match(int numPlayers)
    Class constructor specifying numPlayers

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addPlayer(String nickname)
    Add a player to the match, only if the match has not reached the maximum number of players

    Assign a starter card to each player
    Map<String,Integer>
    calculateEndgamePoints()
    It calculates for every player the points won by achieving the objectives: the 2 public objectives shared in all the match and, for each player, their secret one.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

  • Constructor Details

    • Match

      public Match(int numPlayers)
      Class constructor specifying numPlayers
      Parameters:
      numPlayers - An int that represents the number of players that is required in order to start the match. If numPlayers is negative, creates a Match with 0 players.

  • Method Details

    • getPlayerOrder

      public List<Player> getPlayerOrder()

    • getNumPlayers

      public int getNumPlayers()
      Get the number of players of the match
      Returns:
      the number of the players of the match

    • getPlayerNames

      public List<String> getPlayerNames()
      Get the list of the nicknames of the players of the match
      Returns:
      a List of the nicknames of the players of the match

    • getPublicCards

      public int[] getPublicCards()
      Get the indexes of the public drawable cards
      Returns:
      an int[4] array, that are the indexes of the public drawable cards (-1 if there is no card in that position) 0 = gold card 1 1 = gold card 2 2 = resource card 1 3 = resource card 2

    • getDeckColours

      public CardColour[] getDeckColours()
      Get the colour of the first card of each deck
      Returns:
      a String[2] array, that are the colours of the first card of each deck 0 = gold deck 1 = resource deck

    • getCardsInHand

      public List<Integer> getCardsInHand(String nickname)
      Get the cards in the hand of a player.
      Parameters:
      nickname - A String that identifies the player.
      Returns:
      A List of Integers that are the indexes of the cards in the hand of the player.

    • getPlayerTurn

      public String getPlayerTurn()
      Get the player whose turn is now
      Returns:
      a String that is a nickname of the player whose turn is now

    • getLastPlacedCard

      public int getLastPlacedCard(String nickname)
      Get the last placed card of a player
      Parameters:
      nickname - A String that identifies the player.
      Returns:
      An int that is the index of the last placed card.

    • getLastPlacedCardSide

      public Boolean getLastPlacedCardSide(String nickname)
      Get the side of the last placed card of a player
      Parameters:
      nickname - A String that identifies the player.
      Returns:
      true if the last card was placed on the front, otherwise false.

    • getPlayerColour

      public PlayerColour getPlayerColour(String nickname)
      Get the colour of a player
      Parameters:
      nickname - A String that identifies the player.
      Returns:
      the colour of the player.

    • getObjectivesToChoose

      public int[] getObjectivesToChoose(String nickname)
      Get a couple of objective cards, from which a player can choose his secret objective.
      Parameters:
      nickname - A String that identifies the player.
      Returns:
      an array of 2 int, that are the indexes of 2 objective cards.

    • getSecretObjective

      public Integer getSecretObjective(String nickname)
      Get the secret objective of a player.
      Parameters:
      nickname - A String that identifies the player.
      Returns:
      An int that is the index of the player's secret objective.

    • getPublicObjectives

      public int[] getPublicObjectives()
      Get the public objectives.
      Returns:
      An array of 2 int, that are the indexes of public objectives.

    • getPlayerPoints

      public Integer getPlayerPoints(String nickname)
      Get the points of a player
      Parameters:
      nickname - A String that identifies the player.
      Returns:
      the total number of points that the player has scored

    • isTurn

      public boolean isTurn(String nickname) throws WrongInformationException
      Check whether it's the turn of a specific player
      Parameters:
      nickname - A String to identify the player
      Returns:
      true if it's the turn of the player, otherwise false.
      Throws:
      WrongInformationException - if the player is not part of the match.

    • addPlayer

      public void addPlayer(String nickname)
      Add a player to the match, only if the match has not reached the maximum number of players
      Parameters:
      nickname - A string that identifies the user

    • randomizePlayerOrder

      public void randomizePlayerOrder()
      Set a random player order.

    • createDecks

      public void createDecks() throws EmptyDeckException
      Initialize the decks for the match
      Throws:
      EmptyDeckException

    • assignStartCards

      public void assignStartCards()
      Assign a starter card to each player

    • placeStartCard

      public void placeStartCard(String nickname, Boolean selectedSide) throws InvalidPlacementException
      Place the starter card on the grid of the player.
      Parameters:
      nickname - A String that identifies the player.
      selectedSide - A boolean that indicates the selected side of the starter card: TRUE = front; FALSE = back
      Throws:
      InvalidPlacementException - if a start card has already been placed.

    • setPlayerColour

      public void setPlayerColour(String nickname, PlayerColour selectedColour)
      Assign a color to the player.
      Parameters:
      nickname - A String that identifies the player.
      selectedColour - the colour chosen by th player.

    • drawObjective

      public ObjectiveCard drawObjective() throws EmptyDeckException
      Draw an objective card from the deck
      Returns:
      the drawn card
      Throws:
      EmptyDeckException - if the objective deck is empty

    • distributeCards

      public void distributeCards() throws EmptyDeckException
      Distribute cards to the players, in order to start the match.
      Throws:
      EmptyDeckException - if there aren't enough cards in the decks

    • setPlayerObjective

      public void setPlayerObjective(String nickname, boolean selectedObjective)
      Assign the selected secret objective to each player.
      Parameters:
      nickname - A String that identifies the player
      selectedObjective - A boolean that indicates the selected secret objective: TRUE = first objective; FALSE = second objective.

    • getPlaceablePositions

      public List<Coordinate> getPlaceablePositions(int xpos, int ypos) throws InvalidSearchPositionException
      Check which positions are available for placing, around a selected card, for the player whose turn is now.
      Parameters:
      xpos - An int that represents the row of the selected card.
      ypos - An int that represents the column of the selected card.
      Returns:
      a List of Coordinates, that are the available positions.
      Throws:
      InvalidSearchPositionException - if the selected position is invalid.

    • placeCard

      public int placeCard(int index, boolean side, int xpos, int ypos) throws InvalidPlacementException
      Place the selected card on the grid of the player whose turn is now.
      Parameters:
      index - An int that indicates which card has to be placed
      side - A boolean that indicates the selected side of the card: TRUE = front; FALSE = back;
      xpos - An int that represents the row of the position where to place the card.
      ypos - An int that represents the column of the position where to place the card.
      Returns:
      the number of points obtained with the placement
      Throws:
      InvalidPlacementException - if the placement fails.

    • drawCard

      public void drawCard(int index) throws EmptyDeckException
      Draw a card for the player whose turn is now
      Parameters:
      index - An int that indicates which card has to be drawn. - index = 0 : public gold 1; - index = 1 : public gold 2; - index = 2 : public resource 1; - index = 3 : public resource 2; - index = 4 : hidden gold; - index = 5 : hidden resource;
      Throws:
      EmptyDeckException - if the selected deck is empty.

    • nextTurn

      public int nextTurn()
      Pass the turn to the next player.
      Returns:
      an int: if the return value is lower or equals 2, it's the number of remaining rounds. if the return value is higher than 2, it means that the match has not reached its final stage yet.

    • checkEndGameCondition

      public boolean checkEndGameCondition()
      Returns:
      TRUE if the match is entering the final stage

    • calculateEndgamePoints

      public Map<String,Integer> calculateEndgamePoints()
      It calculates for every player the points won by achieving the objectives: the 2 public objectives shared in all the match and, for each player, their secret one. It puts them in the total points of each player and also regroups them in a map.
      Returns:
      a map with every player nickname and their objectives points

    • orderByPoints

      public int orderByPoints(Map<String,Integer> finalPoints)
      It defines the final order, the result of the match, and reorders the players accordingly
      Parameters:
      finalPoints - a map containing the objective points of every player
      Returns:
      the number of winners
